texto: Spinning, flying, dreaming, falling, Running when I hear you calling, Even when you’re far from reach, I still can’t catch my breath.”Elliot paused and let Chris’s guitar echo for a long moment before he practically whispered the final line into his microphone.“The one you took from me….
explicacao: Citação de M.J. O'Shea sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “Spinning, flying, dreaming, falling, Running when I hear you calling, Even when you’re far from r…” articula motivacao, music, reflexao em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
